# nupm fixture corpus (Phase 6.0)

Synthetic fixtures for Numan's nupm interoperability work. They mirror layouts and metadata shapes from the official [nushell/nupm](https://github.com/nushell/nupm) repository at the pinned revision in `pinned-nupm-revision.txt`.

See [docs/nupm-compatibility.md](../../../docs/nupm-compatibility.md) for the supported/rejected profiles and test matrix.

**Phase 6.0 is audit-only** — no Rust parser or CLI consumes these fixtures yet. Phase 6.1+ will drive unit tests from this corpus.
